description_long: This is a freestanding, full-size oven with a robust, industrial design, featuring a matte black and dark gray finish. The front panel is equipped with five large, round control knobs and a single button, all arranged horizontally above the oven door, which has a wide, horizontal handle. The cooktop includes four heavy-duty gas burners with cast iron grates, and the oven door has a large, rectangular glass window for viewing the interior. The sides and back of the oven are solid, with a slightly textured, dark surface and no visible openings or features. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some glass and plastic components. The oven is designed for placement against a wall or within a kitchen setup, but could also be found in urban environments such as outdoor kitchens or communal cooking areas.
description: A large, freestanding black and gray oven with a glass windowed door, five control knobs, and four gas burners on top. The design is industrial and robust, with a wide horizontal handle and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a large glass window, five control knobs, a button, and a wide horizontal handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, matte black side panel and the depth of the cooktop and oven body.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with a matte finish and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a solid, matte black panel and a glimpse of the cooktop's edge.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located above the oven door and features five large, round knobs arranged in a horizontal row, with a single button positioned centrally. The panel is metallic with a brushed finish, and the controls are clearly separated, with no visible digital displays or touchscreens. There are no visible labels or markings on the controls in the images.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a wide, horizontally mounted bar that protrudes outward, appearing to be made of metal with a matte black finish. It is robust and ergonomically designed for a firm grip, with no decorative elements.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, rectangular glass window is centered on the oven door, allowing visibility into the oven's interior.
